title: figma-config.json
description: Per-project configuration consumed by every Figma skill. Declares the Figma file, the paths that form the three-file contract, and artifact locations.

fileKey.description: Figma file key from the URL: figma.com/design/[fileKey]/...

branchKey.description: Optional branch key if working on a Figma branch. Used as the effective fileKey for MCP calls when set.

knownPages.description: Page names in the Figma file. Used by skills for page routing and audits.

componentsPage.description: Name of the page that holds component definitions.

designDocPath.description: Path to the project's design.md — the rules layer of the three-file contract.

registryPath.description: Path to the project's figma-registry.json — the state layer of the three-file contract.

auditsDir.description: Directory where per-page audit artifacts are persisted.

driftManifestPath.description: Path where figma-drift-scan writes its YAML output.

auditReportPath.description: Path where figma-design-audit writes its YAML output.

parityReportPath.description: Path where figma-design-sync writes its human-readable parity report.

tokensDir.description: Directory holding project token files (CSS / JSON / YAML).

tailwindThemePath.description: Optional path to the Tailwind theme CSS, if the project uses Tailwind.

contextDir.description: Optional directory of project-specific context documents (design decisions, prior specs, etc.).

scriptsPath.description: Optional override for the location of the figma_primitives Python package. Defaults to the claude-figma-skills repo bundled scripts/.

clearBetweenSegments.description: Whether the skill should /clear context between major work phases.
